The propellers on adjacent engines are right-hand (CW) and left-hand (CCW). Attach the marked propeller to the marked motor and the unmarked propeller to the unmarked motor. When replacing the propellers, it is also necessary to replace the screws. Use the screws provided in the propeller package and make sure they are tightened securely. It is recommended to use the screwdriver provided in the package for installation and removal. Using the wrong size screwdriver can damage the screws or make them impossible to loosen. Damaged propellers should be replaced as soon as possible.
